top5.title: UniCorrn: Unified Correspondence Transformer Across 2D and 3D
top5.summary: First unified correspondence model with shared weights across 2D-2D, 2D-3D, and 3D-3D matching. Introduces a novel dual-stream Transformer decoder that decouples appearance and positional features. Achieves +8% on 7Scenes (2D-3D) and +10% on 3DLoMatch (3D-3D) in registration recall, while maintaining competitive 2D-2D performance.

top5.title: Large Language Models are Universal Reasoners for Visual Generation
top5.summary: Proposes UniReasoner, a framework that leverages an LLM as a universal reasoner to close the understanding-generation gap in text-to-image models. Uses a Draft-Evaluate-Diffuse pipeline where the LLM generates a visual draft, critiques it for prompt consistency, and conditions a diffusion model on the joint signals. Improves GenEval from 0.79 to 0.88 without changing the diffusion backbone.

top5.title: Mantis: Mamba-native Tuning is Efficient for 3D Point Cloud Foundation Models
top5.summary: First Mamba-native parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework for 3D point cloud foundation models. Introduces State-Aware Adapter (SAA) that injects task-conditioned control into selective state-space updates, and Dual-Serialization Consistency Distillation (DSCD) for stable training. Achieves better-than-full-finetuning results with only ~5% trainable parameters, preserving Mamba's linear complexity.

top5.title: Audio-Visual Intelligence in Large Foundation Models
top5.summary: Comprehensive survey of audio-visual intelligence in large foundation models, covering architectures, training strategies, and downstream tasks across the audio-visual landscape. Provides a unified taxonomy and identifies key challenges and future directions at the intersection of vision and audio understanding.

top5.title: StateVLM: A State-Aware Vision-Language Model for Robotic Affordance Reasoning
top5.summary: Introduces a state-aware vision-language model that explicitly models object states and affordances for robotic manipulation. Enables reasoning about how object states change during interaction, improving performance on robotic affordance reasoning benchmarks by grounding visual understanding in physical state transitions.
